description: Research Study Mode - Add /study flow for a 2-week human pilot study (N=20-30) with stress and food-emotion EEG sessions, anonymous data collection, and admin CSV export

userStories.title: Add study_participants and study_sessions tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables to store participant consent and session data for the research study.
acceptanceCriteria: Add study_participants table to shared/schema.ts: id (serial PK), participant_code (varchar, unique), age (int), diet_type (varchar), has_apple_watch (boolean), consent_text (text), consent_timestamp (timestamp), created_at (timestamp default now())

Add study_sessions table to shared/schema.ts: id (serial PK), participant_code (varchar), block_type (varchar: 'stress' | 'food' | 'sleep'), eeg_features_json (jsonb), pre_eeg_json (jsonb), post_eeg_json (jsonb), survey_json (jsonb), intervention_triggered (boolean default false), status (varchar default 'pending'), created_at (timestamp default now())
Run drizzle-kit push successfully against Neon PostgreSQL
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add study consent and registration API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints to handle participant consent and registration.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/study/consent — accepts { participant_code, consent_text, age, diet_type, has_apple_watch }, saves to study_participants, returns { success: true, participant_code }
Returns 400 if participant_code already exists or is missing
Routes added to server/routes.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add study session start and complete API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints to create and complete study sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/study/session/start — accepts { participant_code, block_type }, creates pending session record, returns { session_id }
POST /api/study/session/complete — accepts { session_id, eeg_features_json, pre_eeg_json, post_eeg_json, survey_json, intervention_triggered }, updates session status to 'completed'
Returns 400 if participant_code not found or session_id invalid
Routes added to server/routes.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add study admin API routes with CSV export
userStories.description: As Sravya, I need admin-only API endpoints to view participants, sessions, and export CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/study/admin/participants — returns all participants (requires existing auth middleware)
GET /api/study/admin/sessions — returns all sessions with participant codes (requires auth)

GET /api/study/admin/export-csv — returns CSV file with columns: participant_code, block_type, pre_alpha, pre_beta, pre_theta, post_alpha, post_beta, post_theta, intervention_triggered, and all survey numeric fields
Unauthenticated requests to admin routes return 401
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build /study landing page
userStories.description: As a potential participant, I want to understand the study and join it from a single page.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudyLanding.tsx
Route added to App.tsx at /study
Page shows: study title, description, time required (25-40 min), that it is anonymous
Join the Study button navigates to /study/consent
Page is mobile-responsive with Tailwind
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build /study/consent page
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to read and digitally sign the consent form before starting.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudyConsent.tsx (or update existing if present)
Route at /study/consent
Shows full informed consent text (what data is collected, how used, voluntary, right to withdraw)
Checkbox: I have read and agree to participate voluntarily
Text input for participant code (e.g. P001)
Continue button disabled until checkbox checked and code entered
On submit: POST to /api/study/consent with participant data
On success: navigate to /study/profile
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build /study/profile page
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to enter basic demographic info before starting sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudyProfile.tsx
Route at /study/profile
Fields: age (number), diet type (dropdown: omnivore/vegetarian/vegan/other), Apple Watch ownership (yes/no toggle)
Start Session button navigates to /study/session/stress
Profile data saved by updating study_participants record via PATCH /api/study/consent or inline on consent POST
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build stress session step UI shell with progress indicator
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to see a step-by-step interface for the stress session with a progress bar.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudySessionStress.tsx
Route at /study/session/stress
Shows 5-step progress indicator at top (Baseline, Work Task, Intervention, Post-session, Survey)
Each step renders different content based on current step state
Navigation between steps via Next button (no skipping)
Participant code read from URL param or localStorage
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement stress session Step 1 (Baseline) and Step 2 (Work Task)
userStories.description: As a participant, I want a timed baseline EEG recording and work task phase.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 Baseline: 5-min countdown timer, instructional text (sit still, eyes closed), captures EEG features from /api/analyze-eeg, stores as pre_eeg_json
Step 2 Work Task: 15-min countdown timer, text 'Continue your normal work', shows live stress indicator from existing stress classification
Timers show minutes:seconds countdown with visual progress ring or bar
Auto-advances to next step when timer completes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement stress session Step 3 (Intervention) and Step 4 (Post-session)
userStories.description: As a participant, I want the breathing exercise to trigger and post-session EEG capture.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 3 Intervention: auto-triggers when stress_index > 0.65 during work task OR at 15-min mark, shows breathing exercise (Box Breathing or Physio Sigh), sets intervention_triggered = true
Step 4 Post-session: 5-min countdown timer, captures post-intervention EEG as post_eeg_json
If stress never exceeds threshold, intervention still triggers at end of work task
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement stress session Step 5 (Survey) and session completion
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to answer the post-session survey and have my data saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 5 Survey: three 1-10 slider questions — Did you feel stressed? Did the breathing help? How do you feel now?
Submit button POSTs to /api/study/session/complete with all collected data
On success: navigates to /study/complete
Stores survey responses as survey_json
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build food-emotion session page with all steps
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to complete the food-emotion session: pre-meal EEG, eat, post-meal EEG, survey.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudySessionFood.tsx
Route at /study/session/food
Step 1 Pre-meal survey: hunger (1-10), current mood (1-10)
Step 2 Pre-meal baseline: 5-min timer with Muse 2, captures EEG as pre_eeg_json
Step 3 Eat your meal: instruction to remove headband, user-controlled timer (15-20 min default)
Step 4 Post-meal EEG: 10-min timer, captures EEG as post_eeg_json
Step 5 Post-meal survey: what did you eat (text), how healthy (1-10), energy (1-10), mood (1-10), satisfaction (1-10)
On complete: POST to /api/study/session/complete, navigate to /study/complete
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build /study/complete confirmation page
userStories.description: As a participant, I want confirmation that my session was saved and know what to do next.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudyComplete.tsx
Route at /study/complete
Shows 'Session complete — thank you!' message
Shows which blocks are done vs remaining (reads from API or localStorage)
If food block not done: button to /study/session/food
If both done: final thank-you message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build /study/admin dashboard with participant table and CSV export
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want to see all participants and sessions, and export data as CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: client/src/pages/study/StudyAdmin.tsx
Route at /study/admin, guarded by existing auth (redirect to /auth if not logged in)
Table showing: participant_code, age, diet_type, has_apple_watch, sessions_completed count, last_session_date
Clickable row expands to show session details (block type, survey scores, intervention_triggered)
Export CSV button triggers download of /api/study/admin/export-csv
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
